sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68626" key="mono/pteros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μονό-πτερος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, of a circular temple, <sense id="n68626.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with a row of columns only</tr_>, and no cella (cf. <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πτερόν</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">111.9</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vitr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.8.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
